caption: A man dressed in a blue traditional martial arts uniform performs a demonstration on a large blue mat in a grand ballroom. He holds a long staff with a red tip, which he maneuvers through a series of athletic movements. The room features high ceilings with recessed lighting, gold-toned walls, and large chandeliers. In the background, a seated audience watches the performance from rows of tables covered in red cloths. As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his weight into a deep stance and swings the staff in a wide arc from above his head, bringing it down across his body in a sweeping motion. The spectators remain seated and attentive throughout the demonstration. No on-screen text or logos are visible in the scene.
